// 교육용 빅뱅 시뮬레이션 - 원자핵 모델 기반 4단계 진화 과정
import*as THREE from"three";/**
 * 1️⃣ 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마 (2초)
 * 중앙의 핵 + 주변 입자들이 빠르게 회전하며 접근
 */export function createQuarkGluonPlasma(){let numParticles=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:500000;const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙 핵 (50만 개의 고에너지 입자)
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=50000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.random()*80;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 극도로 뜨거운 상태: 흰색/노란색
if(Math.random()>0.5){coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else{coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.9;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.0,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.9});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);group.add(corePoints);// 주변 입자들 (400,000개) - 원형 궤도
const orbitGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numOrbit=400000;const orbitPositions=new Float32Array(numOrbit*3);const orbitColors=new Float32Array(numOrbit*3);const orbitAngles=new Float32Array(numOrbit);// 각도 저장
for(let i=0;i<numOrbit;i++){// 여러 궤도 레이어 생성
const layer=Math.floor(i/(numOrbit/3));// 0, 1, 2
const orbitRadius=150+layer*120;const angle=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const orbitalTilt=Math.random()*Math.PI*0.3;orbitPositions[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*orbitRadius*Math.cos(orbitalTilt);orbitPositions[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*orbitRadius;orbitPositions[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*orbitRadius*Math.sin(orbitalTilt);orbitAngles[i]=angle;// 쿼크 색상
const type=Math.random();if(type<0.3){orbitColors[i*3]=1.0;// 빨강
orbitColors[i*3+1]=0.2;orbitColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else if(type<0.6){orbitColors[i*3]=0.2;// 초록
orbitColors[i*3+1]=1.0;orbitColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else if(type<0.85){orbitColors[i*3]=0.2;// 파랑
orbitColors[i*3+1]=0.2;orbitColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else{orbitColors[i*3]=1.0;// 노랑
orbitColors[i*3+1]=1.0;orbitColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}orbitGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(orbitPositions,3));orbitGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(orbitColors,3));const orbitMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.8,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.7});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeometry,orbitMaterial);orbitPoints.userData.orbitAngles=orbitAngles;orbitPoints.userData.numOrbit=numOrbit;group.add(orbitPoints);return{group,orbitPoints};}/**
 * 2️⃣ 쿼크 결합 → 양성자/중성자 (2.5초)
 * 중앙 핵 + 3개 쿼크가 모여드는 궤도들
 */export function createQuarkCombination(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙 핵 (양성자/중성자 형성)
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=100000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.random()*60*stageProgress;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 양성자/중성자
if(Math.random()>0.5){coreColors[i*3]=1.0;// 빨강 (양성자)
coreColors[i*3+1]=0.1;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.1;}else{coreColors[i*3]=0.1;// 파랑 (중성자)
coreColors[i*3+1]=0.1;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5+stageProgress*1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.5+stageProgress*0.5});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);group.add(corePoints);// 3개의 쿼크 궤도 (3개 원형 레이어)
const orbitsData=[{radius:200,color:[1.0,0.2,0.2],count:30000},// 빨강
{radius:280,color:[0.2,1.0,0.2],count:40000},// 초록
{radius:360,color:[0.2,0.2,1.0],count:30000}// 파랑
];orbitsData.forEach((orbit,idx)=>{const orbitGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);// 진행에 따라 반지름 감소
const currentRadius=orbit.radius*(1-stageProgress)+120*stageProgress;for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const angle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2+Math.random()*0.2;const orbitalTilt=Math.random()*Math.PI*0.2;positions[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*currentRadius*Math.cos(orbitalTilt);positions[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*currentRadius;positions[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*currentRadius*Math.sin(orbitalTilt);colors[i*3]=orbit.color[0];colors[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];colors[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}orbitGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));orbitGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const orbitMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.0,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:1-stageProgress*0.4});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeom,orbitMat);group.add(orbitPoints);});return group;}/**
 * 3️⃣ 핵융합 → 원자핵 형성 (2.5초)
 * 중앙 핵 + 원소별 다층 궤도 (He, Li, Be)
 */export function createNucleosynthesis(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙 핵 (원자핵 형성)
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=150000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.random()*100*stageProgress;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 핵의 종류
const nucleusType=i%3;if(nucleusType===0){// 헬륨-4: 시안
coreColors[i*3]=0.2;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.8+stageProgress*0.2;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(nucleusType===1){// 리튬: 초록
coreColors[i*3]=0.2;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else{// 베릴륨: 노랑
coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.9;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:2.0+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.5+stageProgress*0.5});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);group.add(corePoints);// 4개의 양성자/중성자 궤도
const orbitRadii=[180,280,380,480];const orbitColors=[[1.0,0.2,0.2],// 빨강
[0.2,1.0,0.2],// 초록
[0.2,0.2,1.0],// 파랑
[1.0,1.0,0.2]// 노랑
];orbitRadii.forEach((baseRadius,idx)=>{const orbitGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const count=40000;const positions=new Float32Array(count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(count*3);// 진행에 따라 반지름 감소
const currentRadius=baseRadius*(1-stageProgress)+140*stageProgress;for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const angle=i/count*Math.PI*2+Math.random()*0.2;const orbitalTilt=Math.random()*Math.PI*0.2;positions[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*currentRadius*Math.cos(orbitalTilt);positions[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*currentRadius;positions[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*currentRadius*Math.sin(orbitalTilt);colors[i*3]=orbitColors[idx%4][0];colors[i*3+1]=orbitColors[idx%4][1];colors[i*3+2]=orbitColors[idx%4][2];}orbitGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));orbitGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const orbitMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:1-stageProgress*0.3});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeom,orbitMat);group.add(orbitPoints);});return group;}/**
 * 4️⃣ 원자 형성 (3초)
 * 중앙 핵 + 다층 전자 궤도 (원자 모델)
 */export function createAtomFormation(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙 핵 (많은 수의 원자)
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numAtoms=100000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numAtoms*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numAtoms*3);for(let i=0;i<numAtoms;i++){const r=Math.random()*5;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 핵: 노란색
coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.8;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.1;}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:4+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);group.add(corePoints);// 3개의 전자 궤도 (K, L, M shell)
const electronOrbits=[{radius:100,count:150000,color:[0.2,0.8,1.0]},// K shell (2e)
{radius:200,count:150000,color:[0.5,0.9,1.0]},// L shell (8e)
{radius:300,count:100000,color:[0.7,0.95,1.0]}// M shell
];electronOrbits.forEach((orbit,shellIdx)=>{const electronGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const time=Date.now()*0.001;const angle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2+time*(shellIdx+1)*0.5;const orbitalTilt=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*0.4;// 진행도에 따라 궤도 반지름 증가
const currentRadius=orbit.radius*stageProgress;positions[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*currentRadius*Math.cos(orbitalTilt);positions[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*currentRadius;positions[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*currentRadius*Math.sin(orbitalTilt);colors[i*3]=orbit.color[0];colors[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];colors[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}electronGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));electronGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const electronMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5+stageProgress*1,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.2+stageProgress*0.6});const electronPoints=new THREE.Points(electronGeom,electronMat);electronPoints.userData.isAnimated=true;electronPoints.userData.shellIndex=shellIdx;group.add(electronPoints);});return group;}/**
 * 빅뱅 교육용 단계 정보
 */export const educationalBigBangStages=[{id:0,name:"쿼크-글루온 플라즈마",timeRange:"10⁻¹² 초 (1 피코초)",koreanTime:"우주 1조분의 1초",description:"우주가 극도로 뜨거워 쿼크와 글루온이 자유롭게 움직이고 있습니다. 이들은 아직 결합되지 않은 상태입니다.",color:0xff6b6b,duration:2000},{id:1,name:"쿼크 결합 → 양성자/중성자",timeRange:"10⁻⁶ 초 (1 마이크로초)",koreanTime:"우주 100만분의 1초",description:"온도가 낮아지면서 쿼크 3개가 결합하여 양성자와 중성자가 형성됩니다. 강한 핵력에 의해 결합됩니다.",color:0x4ecdc4,duration:2500},{id:2,name:"핵융합 → 원자핵 형성",timeRange:"1-3 분",koreanTime:"우주 처음 3분",description:"양성자와 중성자가 결합하여 헬륨-4, 리튬 등 가벼운 원소의 핵이 형성됩니다. 이를 빅뱅 핵합성이라고 합니다.",color:0x95e77d,duration:2500},{id:3,name:"원자 형성",timeRange:"38만 년",koreanTime:"우주 38만 년",description:"우주가 충분히 식으면서 전자가 핵 주위를 돌기 시작합니다. 중성 원자(수소, 헬륨)가 형성되고 우주가 투명해집니다.",color:0xb0a0ff,duration:3000}];export function getEducationalStageInfo(stageId){return educationalBigBangStages[stageId];}export function getTotalEducationalBigBangDuration(){return educationalBigBangStages.reduce((sum,stage)=>sum+stage.duration,0);}
